introSection: Midnight Flyer is a steel roller coaster located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride was announced in June 2023. In October 2023, additional details were announced.

fullText:
Midnight Flyer is a steel roller coaster located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA.

The ride was announced in June 2023. In October 2023, additional details were announced.
